headline: Today's top AI story: Anthropic Halts Access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
bullets: Anthropic Halts Access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
US Gov asks Anthropic to ban 'foreign national' access to Fable, Mythos
Anthropic says US government forced it to disable cybersecurity AI models
America has just done what people keep saying China would do for years...
